holdings.infoBox: XTL is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Extreme Networks stock at 5.87%, Iridium Communications at 5.06%, Viavi Solutions at 4.96%, Cisco Systems at 4.25%, and Applied Optoelectronics at 4.17%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Telecom ETF (XTL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Telecom Select Industry index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US telecom companies selected by the S&P Committee. XTL was launched on Jan 26, 2011 and is issued by State Street.
